activityList.title: INFORMATIONS
discover.description: Nichée dans les hautes terres de Java-Est, Malang allie harmonieusement l'air frais de la montagne à une riche histoire coloniale. Explore des temples anciens, des villages colorés et les paysages volcaniques majestueux qui entourent cette ville intemporelle.
discover.title: DÉCOUVRE LE PATRIMOINE
heritage.facts.01.description: During the colonial era, Malang was titled 'The Paris of East Java' due to its cool mountainous air and well-planned European-style architecture, designed as a luxury retreat for the elite.
heritage.facts.01.title: Parijs van Oost-Java
heritage.facts.02.description: Malang has a unique linguistic culture called 'Boso Walikan,' where words are spoken backwards. It was originally used by local fighters to confuse Dutch colonizers during the independence struggle.
heritage.facts.02.title: Boso Walikan Slang
heritage.facts.03.description: Before the colonial arrival, Malang was the seat of the powerful Singosari Kingdom in the 13th century. Ancient temples like Candi Singosari still stand as silent witnesses to this golden era.
heritage.facts.03.title: Singosari Majesty
heritage.facts.04.description: Malang is famous as the apple producing center of Indonesia. The cool climate of the surrounding Batu highlands makes it the only place in the country where various apple varieties thrive.
heritage.facts.04.title: The Apple Capital
heritage.facts.05.description: The Ijen Boulevard district remains one of Indonesia's most preserved examples of 1920s 'Indo-European' urban design by Herman Thomas Karsten, featuring wide boulevards and distinctive villas.
heritage.facts.05.title: Thomas Karsten's Legacy
heritage.facts.06.description: 'Topeng Malangan' dance masks are carved from local wood, representing a unique 12th-century artistic lineage linking East Java to Majapahit glory through traditional theater.
heritage.facts.06.title: The Mask Tradition
heritage.facts.07.description: Home to over 50 higher education institutions, Malang has been a regional center for knowledge and student life since the early 1900s, earning its reputation as 'Kota Pendidikan'.
heritage.facts.07.title: City of Education
heritage.facts.08.description: The city's famous circular park features a historic monument surrounded by a lotus pond, symbolizing Indonesia's resilience and independence at the very heart of the city.
heritage.facts.08.title: Alun-Alun Tugu
heritage.facts.09.description: Standing since 760 AD, Candi Badut is the oldest temple in East Java, proving that Malang was a center of civilization long before the later Majapahit and Singosari empires.
heritage.facts.09.title: Candi Badut
heritage.facts.10.description: Every year, the city's main thoroughfares transform into living history museums, celebrating the 'old world' charm of local colonial life through the Malang Tempo Doeloe festival.
heritage.facts.10.title: Tempo Doeloe
hero.airplane.title: bienvenue dans la magnifique
hero.explorer.label: Explorateur Malang
hero.intro.label: Découvrir l'Indonésie
hero.intro.subtitle: Un voyage à travers la ville la plus envoûtante de Java-Est — des temples anciens aux panoramas montagneux.
history.card01.desc: What looks like a vibrant tourist spot today actually started from an unexpected transformation...
history.card01.title: The Hidden Story Behind Colorful Village
history.card02.desc: Once considered an overlooked area, this village became one of Indonesia’s most iconic destinations.
history.card02.title: From Slum to Global Attraction
history.card03.desc: Local communities and students collaborated to transform this place into something extraordinary.
history.card03.title: The People Behind the Colors
history.card04.desc: A collective effort that turned a simple neighborhood into a national icon.
history.card04.title: Transformation Through Community
history.card05.desc: After going viral, the village quickly became a must-visit destination in Malang.
history.card05.title: Tourism That Changed Everything
history.card06.desc: Maintaining the beauty while handling mass tourism remains a challenge today.
history.card06.title: Sustainability & Challenges
history.exploreMore: Explore d'autres récits pour découvrir le côté caché de Malang.
history.story01.content:
Jodipan's Colorful Village used to be a neglected slum area. The big change began when a group of students came up with the idea of transforming the face of the village into something more attractive through color.

With the support of a paint company and participation from residents, every house was painted in bright colors. This transformation not only improved the visual appearance but also changed the economic life of the community.

However, behind the beauty, there are challenges in maintaining cleanliness and balancing residents' daily life with tourism.
history.story01.description: What looks like a vibrant tourist spot today actually started from an unexpected transformation.
history.story01.title: The Hidden Story Behind Colorful Village
history.story02.content:
Initially this area was unknown and even avoided by many people. However, with a touch of creativity and community spirit, it transformed into a global tourist destination.

Social media played a major role in introducing this place to the world. In no time, the number of visitors increased drastically.

This change brought both positive impact and challenges in sustainable tourism management.
history.story02.description: Once considered an overlooked area, this village became one of Indonesia's most iconic destinations.
history.story02.title: From Slum to Global Attraction
history.story03.content:
The heart of the transformation was powered by local volunteers and university students who worked side by side. They mixed paint, coordinated neighborhood committees, and convinced skeptical residents.

What started as a small art project snowballed into a city-wide movement. The people behind the colors proved that grassroots creativity could outpace any top-down development plan.

Today the village stands as a living gallery of community-driven change.
history.story03.description: Local communities and students collaborated to transform this place into something extraordinary.
history.story03.title: The People Behind the Colors
history.story04.content:
The transformation of this village was not an overnight miracle. It required months of community organizing, weekly clean-up drives, and difficult conversations about what the neighborhood should become.

Elderly residents who had lived there for decades suddenly found themselves guides for curious visitors from around the world. Children grew up surrounded by art and color instead of gray walls.

The community itself became the main attraction.
history.story04.description: A collective effort that turned a simple neighborhood into a national icon.
history.story04.title: Transformation Through Community
history.story05.content:
When the village went viral on social media, the influx of visitors was overwhelming. Streets that were once quiet became bustling corridors of selfie-takers and curious travelers.

Local artisans suddenly had a market for their crafts. Homestays popped up in family homes. The economic ripple effect reached nearby warungs and transport drivers.

Tourism didn't just change the village — it changed the entire surrounding economy.
history.story05.description: After going viral, the village quickly became a must-visit destination in Malang.
history.story05.title: Tourism That Changed Everything
history.story06.content:
With fame comes responsibility. Managing waste from thousands of daily visitors, preserving the painted walls from weather damage, and ensuring that tourism revenue benefits the actual residents are ongoing challenges.

The village now experiments with entrance fees, guided tour systems, and community-owned souvenir cooperatives.

Sustainability isn't a destination — it's an everyday practice for those who call this colorful place home.
history.story06.description: Maintaining the beauty while handling mass tourism remains a challenge today.
history.story06.title: Sustainability & Challenges
history.subtitle: Découvre les histoires derrière les lieux emblématiques de Malang.
history.title: Histoire
planner.advice.estimatesBased: Estimations basées sur les taux de change actuels pour {{origin}}.
planner.advice.heading: Ton Itinéraire Malang
planner.counsel.dry: Avec un ciel dégagé sur les montagnes d'Arjuno, la voie est ouverte à l'exploration. Une stratégie {{budget}} permet une expérience immersive dans les monuments les plus emblématiques de Malang.
planner.counsel.rainy: Alors que la brume de Malang enveloppe la ville, nous t'invitons à explorer les couloirs du patrimoine intérieur. Ton choix d'une approche {{budget}} garantit un voyage confortable à travers les merveilles abritées de la ville.
planner.input.estimatesAdapt: Les estimations s'adaptent au pouvoir d'achat
planner.modal.subtitle: Conseil personnalisé selon ton profil de voyageur
planner.modal.title: Planifie ta Visite
planner.suggestion.backpacker: Priorise les 'Angkringan' locaux et les promenades patrimoniales. Haute valeur, faible friction.
planner.suggestion.balanced: Mélange séjours boutiques et visites culturelles guidées. Le point idéal du confort.
planner.suggestion.luxury: Villas privées et restauration choisie. Vis l'héritage du vieux Malang.
planner.teaser.subtitle: Dis-nous ton budget et l'ambiance que tu recherches, on t'aide à planifier ton voyage
planner.teaser.title: Tu ne sais pas par où commencer ?
tech.closing.subtitle: Mêlant culture, éducation, tourisme et technologie.
tech.creative.desc01: Foyer de dizaines d'universités de premier plan et de milliers d'étudiants.
tech.creative.desc02: Un écosystème numérique actif et inclusif pour les innovateurs.
tech.creative.desc03: Où naît et se cultive l'innovation créative basée sur la technologie.
tech.creative.desc04: L'énergie jeune qui façonne l'identité moderne de la ville.
tech.creative.label: Le Moteur Créatif
tech.entrance.description: Une symphonie entre éducation, créativité et technologie qui grandit ensemble au cœur de Java-Est.
tech.entrance.title: Synergie Technologique Malang Raya
tech.future.label: Vision d'Avenir
tech.future.quote: Alors que la technologie continue d'évoluer, Malang embrasse la transformation numérique pour créer une expérience urbaine plus intelligente, plus connectée et plus accessible.
tech.hero.label: Cité Numérique Nusantara
tech.hero.subtitle: Une ville où l'éducation, la créativité et la technologie continuent de grandir ensemble.
tech.timeline.desc1980: Connue comme l'une des principales villes éducatives d'Indonésie.
tech.timeline.desc2000: Les industries créatives et le tourisme ont connu une croissance rapide et massive.
tech.timeline.desc2015: Les communautés numériques et les startups ont commencé à prospérer dans toute la ville.
tech.timeline.descToday: Malang grandit comme une ville moderne portée par la technologie.
tech.timeline.subtitle: Un voyage d'évolution et d'innovation.

weather.placesMatched: lieux adaptés à la météo du jour
weather.prediction.overcast01: Cool and misty. The perfect atmosphere for exploring Malang boutique cafes.
weather.prediction.overcast02: Soft light today. Ideal for photography and wandering through the historical center.
weather.prediction.overcast03: Expect gentle breezes. A comfortable day for seeing the sights without the heat.
weather.prediction.rainy01: Bring an umbrella. Malang rainy charm is best enjoyed in our world-class museums.
weather.prediction.rainy02: Tropical showers expected. A cozy day for legendary culinary tours indoors.
weather.prediction.rainy03: Wet streets and fresh air. We recommend visiting Museum Angkut today.
weather.prediction.sunny01: Clear skies today, perfect for a sunrise hike at Mount Bromo.
weather.prediction.sunny02: Bright and warm. A great day to explore the vibrant Kampung Jodipan.
weather.prediction.sunny03: Uninterrupted views of the city. We recommend outdoor exploration today.
